title: A The End Update
description: An update for The End that the Minecraft community ask for a long time.
body:
# The End Update

The End has always been a place of mystery… but in this modpack, it’s transformed into a living, breathing dimension full of secrets, challenges, and beauty. Step through the End Portal and discover an experience unlike any other.

### I DON'T OWN ANY MODS IN THIS MODPACK.
> Turn on all the resource packs for the best experience.

![The end update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/644f9a9bdeeb314af16c71d8dcd87672dc42e8bb_0.webp)

Features:

New End Biomes — Explore vibrant forests, crystal plains, and otherworldly landscapes that reshape the End into a true dimension.

Biomes — Encounter new biomes for The End with new types of trees and enemies.

Expanded Progression — Craft unique gear, harvest exotic resources, and revamp the whole End city. Added new structure called The End Castle and The End villages.

Danger & Discovery — Face challenging dungeons, deadly mobs, and rare loots.

Enhanced Atmosphere — Custom sounds, skies, and visuals to make every step into the void feel immersive and surreal.

Revamped the whole End mainland territory, added more attacks to the Ender Dragon to make killing it more challenging.

Added more foods, an exclusive ore for The End, and custom eyes of Ender.

Whether you’re a builder, explorer, or adventurer, this pack reimagines the End as a true final frontier — not just the dragon’s lair, but a dimension worth conquering.

Please support me by downloading this modpack and also visit my collection [here](https://modrinth.com/collection/ftMUuaWJ)
